scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports GPA-policy notes for this school. Where the school does not publish a hard GPA cutoff or admitted-student GPA distribution, the panel says that directly instead of inventing a threshold.
policy_summary: Clemson reviews GPA, class rank, and course rigor, but the cited official admissions pages do not state a minimum GPA requirement.

what_mit_does_say.claim: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.
